ddls:
CREATE TABLE "glass_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each glass sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the glass sample */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the glass sample */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the glass sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the sample */,
  "refractive_index" REAL /* Refractive index of the glass sample */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sample (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sample record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glass_samples_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glass_samples_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES sample_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., manufacturer, university, lab) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical composition record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample */,
  "sodium" REAL /* Concentration of Sodium (Na) in the sample */,
  "magnesium" REAL /* Concentration of Magnesium (Mg) in the sample */,
  "aluminum" REAL /* Concentration of Aluminum (Al) in the sample */,
  "silicon" REAL /* Concentration of Silicon (Si) in the sample */,
  "potassium" REAL /* Concentration of Potassium (K) in the sample */,
  "calcium" REAL /* Concentration of Calcium (Ca) in the sample */,
  "barium" REAL /* Concentration of Barium (Ba) in the sample */,
  "iron" REAL /* Concentration of Iron (Fe) in the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_compositions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date of the modification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the modification (if applicable) */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the modification was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_modifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_modifications_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_modifications_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., research, engineering) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the sample */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., physical, chemical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_properties_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the analysis */,
  "analyzer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab where the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_analyzer_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyzer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_uses" (
  "use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each use case */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample */,
  "use_description" TEXT /* Description of the use or application */,
  "application_area" TEXT /* Area of application (e.g., optics, electronics) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the sample is used */,
  "use_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was used */,
  "use_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_uses_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_uses_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab */,
  "lab_location" TEXT /* Location of the lab */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the lab */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the lab */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)
